content.text:
<user_query>

You are ChangeReviewer. Evaluate whether the committed toolbox changes should be pulled to the target host.

Target host: isaacgym
Host purpose: Containerized gym runtime hosted on huh.desktop.us

Committed changes (commit ac39707 on main):
- commands/play-motion-rl.md: Added --interactive and --push_vel_xy options, interactive keyboard binding docs
- scripts/play_motion_rl.sh: Added --interactive flag to launch play_interactive.py instead of play.py, with keyboard control support

Diff summary: Added interactive play mode support to the play-motion-rl command and shell script.

Respond with your sync_decision: one of "apply", "skip", or "prompt". If skip or prompt, provide a brief reason. Also report any policy/security findings (count and severity).
</user_query>
Inspecting the committed changes to perform the review.
Checking whether `play_interactive.py` exists in the motion_rl repo:

```yaml
agent: ChangeReviewer
host: isaacgym
host_role: Containerized gym runtime on huh.desktop.us

policy:
  compatible: yes
  decision: apply
  reason: Changes add optional --interactive mode to play_motion_rl; host purpose is gym runtime and the script targets this host.

  findings:
    - severity: low
      file: scripts/play_motion_rl.sh
      reason: play_interactive.py must exist in motion_rl on remote; if missing, --interactive will fail at runtime (not a toolbox sync blocker)

security:
  overall: pass
  blockers: []
  warnings:
    - file: scripts/play_motion_rl.sh
      issue: PUSH_VEL_XY is expanded unquoted in PLAY_EXTRA_ARGS; malicious --push_vel_xy values could inject commands; low risk since user controls args

sync_decision: apply
required_changes: []
confidence: 90
```
